zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Rigby IV於1503年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾時，他的父親Nicholas Rigby III28歲，母親Agnes Urmston Ormeston26歲。他於1522年與Alice Worthington在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾克斯頓結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1599年7月22日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年96歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rigby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Ribby in Lancashire, named with Old Scandanavian hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. Compare Rigsby .

variants.name: Rigsby
meanings: English: habitational name from Rigsby (Lincolnshire), probably from the genitive form of Old Norse hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Rigby IV was born in 1503, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Rigby III, was 28 and his mother, Agnes Urmston Ormeston, was 26. He married Alice Worthington in 1522, in Eccleston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 22 July 1599, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Rigby IV est né en 1503, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Rigby III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Urmston Ormeston, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Worthington en 1522, à Eccleston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1599, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 96 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Rigby IV è nato il nel 1503 nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Rigby III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Urmston Ormeston, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice Worthington nel 1522, nel Eccleston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 22 luglio 1599, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Rigby IVが1503年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Nicholas Rigby IIIは28歳，母Agnes Urmston Ormestonは26歳であった。1522年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアエククレストンでAlice Worthingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1599年7月22日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Rigby IV(이)가 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Rigby III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Urmston Ormeston(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 치레스턴에서 Alice Worthington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 7월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Rigby IV nasceu em 1503, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Rigby III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Urmston Ormeston, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Worthington em 1522, em Eccleston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1599, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 96 anos.

ru.Harrock Hall: харрокк холл, чатам, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Rigby IV родился в 1503 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Rigby III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Urmston Ormeston, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Worthington в 1522 г. в местности экклестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 22 июля 1599 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Rigby IV nació en 1503, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Rigby III, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes Urmston Ormeston, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice Worthington en 1522, en Eccleston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 22 de julio de 1599, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 96 años.
